name: Mixpanel
description: Product analytics platform for understanding user behaviour in real time. Track events, build funnels, and measure retention across web and mobile. Mixpanel enables teams to answer product questions instantly — from activation rates to feature adoption — without writing SQL.

name: mParticle
description: Customer data platform (CDP) for unifying data across every touchpoint and delivering it to any downstream marketing tool. mParticle resolves customer identity across devices and channels, giving brands a single accurate profile for personalisation at scale.

name: Netcore Cloud
description: AI-powered customer engagement and personalisation platform covering email, push, WhatsApp, and on-site interactions. Netcore's Raman AI predicts the best send time, content, and channel for each individual customer — enabling hyper-personalisation at enterprise scale.

name: OneSignal
description: Customer messaging and engagement platform for push notifications, email, SMS, and in-app messages. OneSignal delivers over 12 billion messages daily, enabling brands to reach customers across every digital channel with zero latency.

name: Salesforce
description: The world's leading CRM platform — connecting sales, service, marketing, and commerce to give brands a complete view of every customer interaction. Salesforce Marketing Cloud enables personalised journeys across email, mobile, advertising, and social at enterprise scale.

name: Oracle Marketing
description: Enterprise data and marketing cloud solutions for large-scale personalisation, audience management, and cross-channel campaign execution. Oracle's Infinity and Responsys platforms power some of the world's most complex B2C marketing programmes.

name: CleverTap
description: All-in-one customer retention platform combining real-time analytics with multi-channel engagement to reduce churn and maximise LTV. CleverTap's TesseractDB powers microsecond audience segmentation across billions of user events.

name: MoEngage
description: Insights-led customer engagement platform for brands to understand customers and engage them in real time across web, mobile, and email. MoEngage's AI-powered Sherpa engine predicts the next best action for each user — reducing churn and increasing lifetime value.

name: AB Tasty
description: Experimentation and personalisation platform for digital experiences — run A/B tests, feature flags, and personalisation without code. AB Tasty enables brands to test every element of the customer journey and deploy winning experiences instantly.

name: Emplifi
description: Unified customer experience platform combining social media management, customer care, and commerce analytics. Emplifi connects brand social performance to real revenue impact — giving teams full visibility from post-performance to customer satisfaction scores.

name: Sitecore
description: Digital experience platform for content management, personalisation, and commerce at enterprise scale. Sitecore XM Cloud enables brands to manage omnichannel content, deliver personalised web experiences, and connect commerce journeys from a single composable architecture.

name: Freshworks
description: Modern business software for sales, support, and marketing teams — CRM, helpdesk, and automation in one intuitive suite. Freshworks makes enterprise-grade software accessible to growing businesses, with fast deployment and low total cost of ownership.

name: Adjust
description: Mobile measurement and fraud prevention platform. Understand the full mobile customer journey with accurate attribution — from first install to long-term retention. Adjust's fraud prevention suite protects mobile ad spend against invalid traffic at scale.

name: Capillary Tech
description: Loyalty and customer engagement platform built for retail and e-commerce — powering tier-based loyalty, promotions, and rewards at scale. Capillary's Loyalty+ platform manages over 500 million loyalty members across 30 countries.

name: Xeno
description: AI-powered CRM platform designed specifically for retail brands in emerging markets — personalised campaigns, loyalty, and customer analytics. Xeno's AI predicts what each customer will buy next, enabling retail brands to drive repeat purchases with surgical precision.

name: Hashmeta.ai
description: Southeast Asia's leading GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) platform — powering AKA Digital's GeoMind solution for AI search visibility audits, LLM citation analysis, and brand presence optimisation across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and other AI engines.
